/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/neuron-ssh-handler.dir/ssh/neuron_ssh_handler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-ssh-handler.dir/ssh/upload_pack.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-ssh-handler.dir/ssh/receive_pack.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-ssh-handler.dir/ssh/ls_refs.cpp.o" -o neuron-ssh-handler  libneuron-core.a libneuron-db.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so
